data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Mileage tracking for reimbursement'. While the use case mentions tracking 127 miles, there is no evidence of how this mileage is processed or reimbursed within the system. The absence of specific API reads or checks related to the reimbursement process indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or processes that confirm how mileage is reimbursed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
